title: PortalInteractionLayer
description: Shared portal interaction-layer contract for customer/client routes. This schema is the contract boundary between server-authored portal interaction semantics and platform-specific rendering. It freezes task-first spacing density, literal client-safe status language, semantic selector profile, one-promoted-support-region discipline, same-shell contextual return, current-primary-history-secondary artifact hierarchy, stacked-below-primary responsive detail, subtle causal motion, and durable receipt or typed failure driven recovery and settlement feedback so portal embodiments cannot drift into route-local warning stacks, detached mobile flows, history-first artifact treatment, or renderer-invented stale and pending explanations. This description also names the portal_interaction_layer_v1 profile.
